title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Electricals - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Electricals - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!
